ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ( ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.StageName , "Finished") || ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.StageName , "Transferred to ERP") || ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.StageName , "Ready for transfer to ERP") ) && ISCHANGED( Amount_Approved__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: לא ניתן לערוך כי הבקשה נסגרה
